RLUSD Stablecoin Full-Scale Rollout Confirmed on XRPL and Ethereum | YES | HIGH confidence**  
The official full-scale rollout of Ripple USD (RLUSD) stablecoin across the XRP Ledger and Ethereum has been confirmed, driving massive capital influx and record-breaking transaction volume on XRPL amid surging institutional adoption.[1]

signals.headline: SEC Legal Battle Officially Resolved | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Legal Battle Officially Resolved | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Ripple's long-standing SEC lawsuit is now "officially in the rearview mirror," removing a major overhang and boosting ecosystem momentum alongside RLUSD launch and central bank integrations for cross-border payments.[1]

signals.headline: XRP ETF Approvals Entering Final Stage | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP ETF Approvals Entering Final Stage | YES | MED confidence**  
XRP ETF approvals are in the final stage with $224M spot inflows in early April (largest since December), Rakuten Wallet live on April 15, and six live ETFs supporting sustained institutional flows over next quarters.[1][2]
